title: orianthera serpyllifolia subsp. serpyllifolia
intro: Orianthera serpyllifolia subsp. serpyllifolia, also known as the wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Oxalidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. Orianthera serpyllifolia subsp. serpyllifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
